title: Backtracking, Constraint Propagation, and Branch-and-Bound · Execution Trace: Search State
summary: Search schedules and assignments while proving why pruned branches cannot help. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 search state increment in a bounded combinatorial solver with pruning audit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define partial assignments, legal extensions, completion, and undo invariants.
Estimate pseudo-polynomial state growth and reject impractical exact models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
